_comment: Illustrative manifest shape. In CI this file is GENERATED by build_corpus.py from licensed public corpora (LibriSpeech + AMI) — audio is fetched into ephemeral runner storage, never committed. `expected` uses clip-level presence labels derived from each corpus's own transcript. Thresholds come from thresholds.json.

provenance.note: populated by build_corpus.py: corpora versions, licenses, source URLs, per-file sha256, attribution

clips.referenceTranscript: the exact words from the LibriSpeech transcript
um the AMI segment transcript with a real disfluency
the the segment with a repeated token
